<!doctype html>
<html lang="zh-Hant">
<head>
<meta charset="utf-8"><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1">
<title>凜月 × 殷漓｜靈魂小世界 v0.10.29.1</title>
<style>
:root{--bg1:#fff3f8;--bg2:#f3edff;--bg3:#eaf7ff;--ink:#44323a;--muted:#8b717b;--rose:#d77f99;--deep:#8c4a61;--card:rgba(255,255,255,.84);--line:rgba(151,91,113,.20);--shadow:0 18px 45px rgba(128,72,100,.16);--soft:0 10px 26px rgba(128,72,100,.11)}
*{box-sizing:border-box}body{margin:0;min-height:100vh;font-family:"Microsoft JhengHei","Noto Sans TC",system-ui,sans-serif;color:var(--ink);background:radial-gradient(circle at 12% 8%,#fff 0 9%,transparent 28%),radial-gradient(circle at 86% 12%,rgba(255,214,232,.82) 0 11%,transparent 31%),linear-gradient(135deg,var(--bg1),var(--bg2) 55%,var(--bg3));overflow-x:hidden}body:before{content:"";position:fixed;inset:0;pointer-events:none;opacity:.5;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(255,255,255,.9) 1px,transparent 2px),radial-gradient(circle,rgba(215,127,153,.24) 1px,transparent 2px);background-size:38px 38px,72px 72px;animation:bg 12s linear infinite}@keyframes bg{to{background-position:38px 38px,-72px 72px}}
.app{position:relative;z-index:1;width:min(1500px,calc(100% - 26px));margin:13px auto;display:grid;grid-template-columns:280px minmax(560px,1fr) 330px;gap:14px}.panel{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:28px;box-shadow:var(--shadow);backdrop-filter:blur(14px)}.side{min-height:calc(100vh - 26px);padding:17px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:13px}.brand{display:flex;gap:12px;align-items:center;padding:12px;border-radius:22px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(255,255,255,.72),rgba(255,218,230,.68));border:1px solid rgba(215,127,153,.20)}.logo{width:55px;height:55px;border-radius:19px;display:grid;place-items:center;color:#fff;font-size:26px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#c77791,#a66ee0);box-shadow:var(--soft)}h1{margin:0;font-size:18px}.brand small,.muted{color:var(--muted);font-weight:700}.section{margin:7px 4px 5px;color:#9a687a;font-size:12px;font-weight:900;letter-spacing:.12em}.nav{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:7px}.nav button,.btn,.send,.chip{appearance:none;border:0;font-family:inherit;cursor:pointer}.nav button{width:100%;text-align:left;padding:11px 12px;border-radius:16px;color:#674853;background:rgba(255,255,255,.58);border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.13);font-weight:850;transition:.18s}.nav button:hover,.nav button.active{transform:translateY(-1px);background:linear-gradient(135deg,#ffe5ee,#f2e9ff);color:var(--deep);box-shadow:var(--soft)}.tag{float:right;font-size:11px;color:#a87b89;background:#fff;padding:2px 7px;border-radius:999px}.profile{margin-top:auto;padding:14px;border-radius:22px;background:rgba(255,248,251,.72);border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.15);font-size:13px;line-height:1.65}
.main{min-height:calc(100vh - 26px);overflow:hidden;display:grid;grid-template-rows:auto 1fr}.top{padding:16px 18px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:14px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line)}h2{margin:0 0 6px;font-size:24px}.top p{margin:0;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.55;font-size:13px}.status{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:flex-end;gap:8px}.pill{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:7px 10px;border-radius:999px;font-size:12px;font-weight:900;color:#7b5261;background:#fff7fa;border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.14);white-space:nowrap}.dot{width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:#7bd7a4}.dot.off{background:#b5a6ad}.content{overflow:auto;padding:18px}.view{display:none}.view.active{display:block}.hero{padding:20px;border-radius:26px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(255,255,255,.70),rgba(255,230,238,.64));border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.16);box-shadow:var(--soft);margin-bottom:16px}.hero h3{margin:0 0 8px;font-size:22px}.hero p,.card p,.card li{margin:0;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.75;font-size:13px}.grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(220px,1fr));gap:13px}.card{padding:15px;border-radius:22px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.68);border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.15);box-shadow:0 8px 18px rgba(128,72,100,.08)}.card h3,.card h4{margin:0 0 10px}.room{min-height:150px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:space-between}.icon{font-size:28px;margin-bottom:7px}
.btn,.send{padding:10px 12px;border-radius:16px;color:#8f4f64;background:#fff7fa;border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.16);font-weight:900}.primary{color:#fff;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#ce7891,#9c6bd7);box-shadow:var(--soft)}.chat-shell{display:grid;grid-template-rows:auto 1fr auto;height:calc(100vh - 150px);min-height:590px;border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.15);border-radius:26px;overflow:hidden;background:rgba(255,255,255,.47)}.modes{padding:13px 14px;display:flex;gap:9px;overflow:auto;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line)}.modes button{flex:0 0 auto;border-radius:999px}.modes button.active{color:#fff;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#ce7891,#ad70dc);box-shadow:var(--soft)}.chat{padding:18px;overflow:auto;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px}.msg{max-width:78%;display:flex;gap:9px;align-items:flex-end}.msg.user{margin-left:auto;flex-direction:row-reverse}.avatar{width:36px;height:36px;flex:0 0 36px;border-radius:14px;display:grid;place-items:center;font-weight:900;color:#fff;box-shadow:var(--soft)}.assistant .avatar{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#8d96c9,#8c4a61)}.user .avatar{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f5a9c0,#dd7e99)}.bubble{position:relative;padding:12px 14px;border-radius:21px;line-height:1.72;box-shadow:0 8px 18px rgba(128,72,100,.08);font-size:15px}.assistant .bubble{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#fff,#fff5f8);border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.15);border-bottom-left-radius:8px}.user .bubble{color:#fff;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#d77f99,#b76dde);border-bottom-right-radius:8px}.meta{margin-top:6px;font-size:11px;color:#a58591}.user .meta{color:rgba(255,255,255,.78)}.secret{display:none;margin-top:8px;padding:10px 12px;border-radius:15px;color:#765160;background:#fff3f8;border:1px dashed rgba(151,91,113,.25)}.secret.show{display:block}.secret-toggle{margin-top:7px;padding:5px 9px;border-radius:999px;font-size:12px;color:#9d5870;background:#fff7fa;border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.14);font-weight:850;cursor:pointer}.composer{padding:12px;border-top:1px solid var(--line);display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr auto auto;gap:9px;background:rgba(255,250,252,.62)}
textarea,input,select{width:100%;border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.20);border-radius:18px;padding:11px 13px;font:inherit;color:var(--ink);background:rgba(255,255,255,.88);outline:none}textarea{min-height:52px;max-height:130px;resize:vertical;line-height:1.55}textarea:focus,input:focus,select:focus{border-color:rgba(215,127,153,.65);box-shadow:0 0 0 4px rgba(215,127,153,.12)}.form{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(190px,1fr));gap:11px}.label{display:block;font-size:12px;font-weight:900;color:#946274;margin:0 0 6px 2px}.split{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.1fr .9fr;gap:13px}.list{display:grid;gap:10px;margin-top:12px}.li{padding:12px;border-radius:18px;background:#fff8fb;border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.13)}.li strong{display:block;margin-bottom:5px}.li span{display:block;color:var(--muted);font-size:13px;line-height:1.6}.badges{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px;margin-top:8px}.badge{display:inline-flex;padding:4px 8px;border-radius:999px;background:#f5dce5;color:#9a5367;font-size:11px;font-weight:900}.ready{background:#dff6e9;color:#4c9670}.todo{background:#fff0c9;color:#a7762e}.soft{background:#e7e1ff;color:#715da4}.diary-page{padding:16px;border-radius:22px;background:linear-gradient(#fffdf9,#fff8ee);border:1px solid rgba(195,122,86,.20);box-shadow:var(--soft)}.toolgrid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px}.model-row{display:grid;gap:10px}.range-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:64px 1fr 64px;align-items:center;gap:9px;color:var(--muted);font-size:12px;font-weight:900}input[type=range]{padding:0;accent-color:#d77f99}.period-summary{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(160px,1fr));gap:10px;margin:12px 0}.metric{padding:13px;border-radius:18px;background:#fff8fb;border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.13)}.metric .num{display:block;font-size:24px;font-weight:950;color:var(--deep)}.metric .cap{color:var(--muted);font-size:12px;font-weight:900}.reminder{padding:14px;border-radius:20px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#ffeaf1,#f3ebff);border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.15);line-height:1.75;color:#694957}.right{min-height:calc(100vh - 26px);padding:16px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:14px}.progress{display:grid;gap:8px}.item{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:10px;align-items:center;padding:9px 10px;border-radius:15px;background:rgba(255,247,250,.72);border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.11);font-size:13px;font-weight:850}.memory{display:grid;gap:8px}.memory-line{padding:10px 11px;border-radius:16px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#fff,#fff8fa);border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.12)}.memory-line strong{display:block;font-size:13px;margin-bottom:3px}.memory-line span{display:block;color:var(--muted);font-size:12px;line-height:1.55}.footer{color:#9c7a84;font-size:12px;line-height:1.65}@media(max-width:1180px){.app{grid-template-columns:250px minmax(480px,1fr)}.right{grid-column:1/-1;min-height:auto;display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr)}}@media(max-width:860px){.app{grid-template-columns:1fr}.side,.main,.right{min-height:auto}.right{display:flex}.msg{max-width:92%}.split{grid-template-columns:1fr}.composer{grid-template-columns:1fr}}

/* ===== Soul Lock Gate ===== */
.lock-screen{
  position:fixed;
  inset:0;
  z-index:9999;
  display:grid;
  place-items:center;
  padding:24px;
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 18% 12%, rgba(255,255,255,.96) 0 10%, transparent 28%),
    radial-gradient(circle at 82% 18%, rgba(255,210,228,.92) 0 12%, transparent 32%),
    linear-gradient(135deg,#fff2f8,#f2e9ff 58%,#e9f7ff);
  transition:.35s ease;
}
.lock-screen.unlocked{
  opacity:0;
  pointer-events:none;
  transform:scale(1.02);
}
.lock-card{
  width:min(430px,100%);
  padding:28px;
  border-radius:32px;
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.86);
  border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.22);
  box-shadow:0 24px 70px rgba(128,72,100,.22);
  backdrop-filter:blur(16px);
  text-align:center;
  position:relative;
  overflow:hidden;
}
.lock-card::before{
  content:"";
  position:absolute;
  right:-48px;
  top:-48px;
  width:140px;
  height:140px;
  border-radius:50%;
  background:rgba(215,127,153,.18);
}
.lock-icon{
  width:76px;
  height:76px;
  margin:0 auto 14px;
  border-radius:26px;
  display:grid;
  place-items:center;
  font-size:34px;
  color:white;
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 34% 25%,rgba(255,255,255,.95) 0 13%,transparent 14%),
    linear-gradient(135deg,#c77791,#a66ee0);
  box-shadow:0 14px 32px rgba(128,72,100,.18);
}
.lock-card h2{
  margin:0 0 8px;
  font-size:25px;
  color:#53343f;
}
.lock-card p{
  margin:0 0 18px;
  color:#8b717b;
  line-height:1.75;
  font-size:14px;
}
.lock-form{
  display:grid;
  gap:10px;
  text-align:left;
}
.lock-form label{
  font-size:12px;
  font-weight:900;
  color:#946274;
  margin-left:4px;
}
.lock-form input{
  width:100%;
  border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.22);
  border-radius:18px;
  padding:13px 14px;
  font:inherit;
  background:#fff9fb;
  outline:none;
}
.lock-form input:focus{
  border-color:rgba(215,127,153,.70);
  box-shadow:0 0 0 4px rgba(215,127,153,.13);
}
.lock-actions{
  display:grid;
  grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;
  gap:9px;
  margin-top:8px;
}
.lock-actions.single{
  grid-template-columns:1fr;
}
.lock-main-btn,.lock-sub-btn{
  appearance:none;
  border:0;
  cursor:pointer;
  border-radius:18px;
  padding:12px 13px;
  font:inherit;
  font-weight:950;
}
.lock-main-btn{
  color:white;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,#ce7891,#9c6bd7);
  box-shadow:0 10px 22px rgba(128,72,100,.16);
}
.lock-sub-btn{
  color:#8f4f64;
  background:#fff7fa;
  border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.16);
}
.lock-msg{
  min-height:22px;
  margin-top:10px;
  color:#b04f66;
  font-size:13px;
  font-weight:850;
  text-align:center;
}
.lock-note{
  margin-top:16px;
  padding:12px;
  border-radius:18px;
  color:#8b6571;
  background:#fff7fa;
  border:1px dashed rgba(151,91,113,.20);
  font-size:12px;
  line-height:1.65;
  text-align:left;
}
.lock-toolbar{
  position:fixed;
  right:16px;
  top:16px;
  z-index:20;
  display:flex;
  gap:8px;
}
.lock-toolbar button{
  appearance:none;
  border:0;
  cursor:pointer;
  padding:9px 11px;
  border-radius:999px;
  color:#8f4f64;
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.78);
  border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.16);
  box-shadow:0 10px 26px rgba(128,72,100,.12);
  font:inherit;
  font-size:12px;
  font-weight:900;
  backdrop-filter:blur(10px);
}


/* ===== Token Monitor ===== */
.token-monitor{
  grid-column:1 / -1;
  display:grid;
  gap:9px;
  padding:11px 12px;
  border-radius:18px;
  background:rgba(255,247,250,.72);
  border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.14);
}
.token-line{
  display:flex;
  justify-content:space-between;
  gap:10px;
  align-items:center;
  flex-wrap:wrap;
  font-size:12px;
  color:#8b6571;
  font-weight:900;
}
.token-stats{
  display:flex;
  flex-wrap:wrap;
  gap:7px;
}
.token-chip{
  display:inline-flex;
  gap:5px;
  align-items:center;
  padding:5px 8px;
  border-radius:999px;
  background:#fff;
  border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.12);
  color:#875467;
  font-size:12px;
  font-weight:900;
}
.token-chip strong{color:#8c4a61;}
.token-bar{
  width:100%;
  height:8px;
  border-radius:999px;
  background:#f2dce5;
  overflow:hidden;
}
.token-bar-fill{
  height:100%;
  width:0%;
  border-radius:999px;
  background:linear-gradient(90deg,#d77f99,#9c6bd7);
  transition:.25s ease;
}
.token-note{
  color:#9c7a84;
  font-size:11px;
  line-height:1.55;
  font-weight:700;
}
.composer.tokenized{
  grid-template-columns:1fr auto auto;
}


/* ===== Mobile Chat Composer Fix v0.5 ===== */
#chatInput{
  min-height:74px;
}
@media (max-width: 760px){
  .chat-shell{
    height:auto !important;
    min-height:72vh !important;
  }
  .composer,
  .composer.tokenized{
    display:grid !important;
    grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr !important;
    gap:10px !important;
    align-items:stretch !important;
  }
  .composer textarea,
  .composer.tokenized textarea,
  #chatInput{
    grid-column:1 / -1 !important;
    width:100% !important;
    min-height:118px !important;
    max-height:190px !important;
    font-size:16px !important;
    line-height:1.65 !important;
    padding:14px 15px !important;
  }
  #sendBubble,
  #askReply{
    width:100% !important;
    min-height:48px !important;
    padding:10px 8px !important;
    font-size:14px !important;
    border-radius:18px !important;
    white-space:normal !important;
    line-height:1.35 !important;
  }
  .token-monitor{
    grid-column:1 / -1 !important;
    padding:12px !important;
  }
  .token-line{
    align-items:flex-start !important;
  }
  .token-stats{
    width:100% !important;
  }
  .token-chip{
    flex:1 1 calc(50% - 8px) !important;
    justify-content:center !important;
    min-width:0 !important;
  }
}
@media (max-width: 430px){
  #sendBubble,
  #askReply{
    font-size:13px !important;
  }
  .token-chip{
    flex:1 1 100% !important;
  }
}


/* ===== Chat Customizer v0.6 ===== */
.chat-shell{position:relative;}
.chat-customizer{
  margin:0 0 12px;
  padding:14px;
  border-radius:22px;
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.72);
  border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.14);
  box-shadow:0 8px 18px rgba(128,72,100,.07);
}
.chat-customizer summary{
  cursor:pointer;
  font-weight:900;
  color:#8c4a61;
  list-style:none;
}
.chat-customizer summary::-webkit-details-marker{display:none}
.chat-customizer summary::after{
  content:"展開";
  float:right;
  color:#a06c7e;
  font-size:12px;
}
.chat-customizer[open] summary::after{content:"收起"}
.custom-grid{
  display:grid;
  grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;
  gap:12px;
  margin-top:12px;
}
.custom-card{
  padding:12px;
  border-radius:18px;
  background:#fff8fb;
  border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.12);
}
.custom-card h4{margin:0 0 9px;font-size:14px;}
.preview-row{display:flex;gap:10px;align-items:center;margin-bottom:10px;}
.preview-avatar{
  width:42px;height:42px;border-radius:16px;display:grid;place-items:center;color:white;
  font-weight:900;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#8d96c9,#8c4a61);
  background-size:cover;background-position:center;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:var(--soft);
}
.preview-avatar.user{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f5a9c0,#dd7e99);}
.small-note{font-size:11px;line-height:1.55;color:#9a7b85;}
.file-input{display:block;width:100%;margin-top:6px;}
.bg-presets{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;margin-bottom:10px;}
.bg-preset{
  width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:12px;border:2px solid rgba(151,91,113,.14);
  cursor:pointer;box-shadow:0 4px 12px rgba(128,72,100,.08);
}
.bg-preset.active{border-color:#c56b8a;transform:translateY(-1px);}
.chat{
  background-size:cover;background-position:center;background-repeat:no-repeat;
}
.custom-actions{display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:10px;}
@media (max-width:760px){
  .custom-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
}


/* ===== Image Upload Compression Fix v0.7 ===== */
.upload-status{
  margin-top:8px;
  min-height:18px;
  color:#9d5870;
  font-size:12px;
  line-height:1.55;
  font-weight:800;
}



/* ===== v0.8 Chat Memory / Core Memory / Backup ===== */
.v08-tools{
  margin:0 0 12px;
  padding:12px 14px;
  border-radius:22px;
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.72);
  border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.14);
  box-shadow:0 8px 18px rgba(128,72,100,.07);
  display:flex;
  align-items:center;
  justify-content:space-between;
  gap:10px;
  flex-wrap:wrap;
}
.v08-tools strong{color:#8c4a61;}
.v08-tools .hint{color:#9a7b85;font-size:12px;line-height:1.55;font-weight:800;}
.v08-actions{display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center;}
.v08-mini-btn{
  appearance:none;
  border:0;
  cursor:pointer;
  padding:8px 10px;
  border-radius:999px;
  color:#8f4f64;
  background:#fff7fa;
  border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.16);
  font:inherit;
  font-size:12px;
  font-weight:900;
}
.v08-mini-btn.primary-mini{color:#fff;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#ce7891,#9c6bd7);}
.v08-mini-btn.danger-mini{color:#a14c5e;background:#fff1f4;}
.v08-counter{font-size:12px;color:#8b6571;font-weight:900;background:#fff;border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.12);border-radius:999px;padding:6px 9px;}
.memory-editor{margin-top:14px;}
.memory-editor .memory-form{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px;margin-top:10px;}
.memory-editor .memory-form label.full{grid-column:1 / -1;}
.memory-list-v08{display:grid;gap:10px;margin-top:12px;}
.memory-card-v08{padding:12px;border-radius:18px;background:#fff8fb;border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.13);}
.memory-card-v08 .memory-head{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:10px;align-items:flex-start;margin-bottom:6px;}
.memory-card-v08 strong{display:block;color:#5f3b48;}
.memory-card-v08 small{display:inline-flex;margin-top:3px;color:#9a5367;background:#f5dce5;border-radius:999px;padding:3px 8px;font-weight:900;}
.memory-card-v08 p{white-space:pre-wrap;margin:0;color:#7e6670;line-height:1.7;font-size:13px;}
.backup-box-v08{margin-top:14px;display:grid;gap:12px;}
.backup-actions-v08{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:9px;align-items:center;}
.backup-status-v08{min-height:20px;color:#9d5870;font-size:12px;font-weight:850;line-height:1.6;}
.build-note-v08{padding:12px;border-radius:18px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#fff7fa,#f6efff);border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.13);color:#765160;line-height:1.7;font-size:13px;}
@media(max-width:760px){
  .v08-tools{align-items:stretch;}
  .v08-actions{width:100%;}
  .v08-mini-btn{flex:1 1 calc(50% - 8px);}
  .memory-editor .memory-form{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
}



/* ===== v0.9 Embedded Rooms: gacha + calendar ===== */
.embedded-room-card{
  padding:14px;
  border-radius:24px;
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.72);
  border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.14);
  box-shadow:0 8px 18px rgba(128,72,100,.07);
}
.embedded-room-note{
  display:flex;
  justify-content:space-between;
  align-items:center;
  gap:12px;
  flex-wrap:wrap;
  margin-bottom:12px;
  padding:12px 14px;
  border-radius:18px;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,#fff8fb,#f4edff);
  border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.13);
  color:#765160;
  font-size:13px;
  line-height:1.7;
}
.embedded-room-note strong{color:#8c4a61;}
.embedded-room-frame{
  width:100%;
  height:calc(100vh - 220px);
  min-height:720px;
  border:0;
  border-radius:22px;
  background:#fff;
  box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(151,91,113,.10);
}
@media(max-width:860px){
  .embedded-room-card{padding:10px;}
  .embedded-room-frame{height:78vh;min-height:680px;border-radius:18px;}
}



/* ===== v0.10 Interactive Contract Library ===== */
.contract-layout-v10{display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1.25fr) minmax(280px,.75fr);gap:14px;align-items:start;margin-bottom:14px;}
.contract-form-card-v10{position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
.contract-form-card-v10::after{content:"";position:absolute;right:-44px;top:-44px;width:140px;height:140px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(215,127,153,.12);pointer-events:none;}
.contract-form-grid-v10{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr));gap:11px;position:relative;z-index:1;}
.contract-form-grid-v10 .full{grid-column:1/-1;}
.contract-body-input-v10{min-height:190px;}
.contract-check-v10{display:flex!important;flex-direction:row!important;align-items:center;gap:9px;padding:10px 12px;border-radius:16px;background:#fff8fb;border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.12);color:#7f5c68!important;font-size:13px!important;}
.contract-check-v10 input{width:auto;accent-color:#d77f99;}
.contract-actions-v10{display:flex;gap:9px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center;margin-top:12px;}
.contract-actions-v10.compact .btn{flex:1 1 130px;text-align:center;}
.contract-status-v10{min-height:20px;margin-top:8px;color:#9d5870;font-size:12px;font-weight:900;line-height:1.6;}
.contract-side-v10{display:grid;gap:14px;}
.contract-summary-grid-v10{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr));gap:9px;margin-top:10px;}
.contract-stat-v10{padding:12px;border-radius:17px;background:#fff8fb;border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.12);}
.contract-stat-v10 strong{display:block;color:#8c4a61;font-size:24px;line-height:1.1;}
.contract-stat-v10 span{display:block;color:#9c7a84;font-size:12px;font-weight:900;margin-top:4px;}
.contract-anchor-list-v10{display:grid;gap:8px;margin-top:10px;max-height:320px;overflow:auto;}
.contract-anchor-v10{padding:10px 11px;border-radius:16px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#fff,#fff7fa);border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.12);}
.contract-anchor-v10 strong{display:block;font-size:13px;color:#5f3b48;margin-bottom:4px;}
.contract-anchor-v10 span{display:block;color:#7e6670;font-size:12px;line-height:1.65;white-space:pre-wrap;}
.contract-library-v10{margin-top:14px;}
.contract-library-head-v10{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:12px;}
.contract-library-head-v10 h3{margin:0 0 6px;}
.contract-library-head-v10 p{margin:0;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.65;font-size:13px;}
.contract-filters-v10{display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center;justify-content:flex-end;}
.contract-filters-v10 input{min-width:220px;}
.contract-filters-v10 select{width:auto;min-width:130px;}
.contract-list-v10{display:grid;gap:12px;}
.contract-card-v10{border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.14);border-radius:22px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(255,255,255,.86),rgba(255,248,251,.78));box-shadow:0 8px 18px rgba(128,72,100,.07);overflow:hidden;}
.contract-card-head-v10{padding:14px 15px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;gap:12px;cursor:pointer;}
.contract-card-title-v10{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px;}
.contract-card-title-v10 strong{font-size:17px;color:#4f3640;}
.contract-card-title-v10 small{color:#9c7a84;font-weight:850;line-height:1.5;}
.contract-badges-v10{display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center;justify-content:flex-end;}
.contract-badge-v10{display:inline-flex;padding:4px 8px;border-radius:999px;background:#f5dce5;color:#9a5367;font-size:11px;font-weight:950;white-space:nowrap;}
.contract-badge-v10.current{background:#dff6e9;color:#4c9670;}
.contract-badge-v10.anchor{background:#fff0c9;color:#a7762e;}
.contract-badge-v10.history{background:#eee7f9;color:#715da4;}
.contract-card-body-v10{display:none;padding:0 15px 15px;}
.contract-card-v10.open .contract-card-body-v10{display:block;}
.contract-summary-v10,.contract-quote-v10,.contract-fulltext-v10{padding:12px;border-radius:17px;background:#fff;border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.11);color:#6d535d;line-height:1.75;font-size:13px;margin-top:9px;white-space:pre-wrap;}
.contract-quote-v10{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#fff8fb,#f4edff);color:#6a4956;font-weight:850;}
.contract-fulltext-v10{max-height:360px;overflow:auto;}
.contract-card-actions-v10{display:flex;gap:7px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:10px;}
.contract-mini-btn-v10{appearance:none;border:0;cursor:pointer;padding:8px 10px;border-radius:999px;font:inherit;font-size:12px;font-weight:950;color:#8f4f64;background:#fff7fa;border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.16);}
.contract-mini-btn-v10.danger{color:#a14c5e;background:#fff1f4;}
.contract-empty-v10{padding:20px;border-radius:18px;background:#fff8fb;border:1px dashed rgba(151,91,113,.20);color:#8b717b;line-height:1.7;text-align:center;}
@media(max-width:980px){.contract-layout-v10{grid-template-columns:1fr}.contract-library-head-v10{display:grid}.contract-filters-v10{justify-content:stretch}.contract-filters-v10 input,.contract-filters-v10 select{width:100%;}}
@media(max-width:760px){.contract-form-grid-v10{grid-template-columns:1fr}.contract-summary-grid-v10{grid-template-columns:1fr}.contract-card-head-v10{display:grid}.contract-badges-v10{justify-content:flex-start}.contract-actions-v10 .btn,.contract-actions-v10 .send{flex:1 1 100%;}}


/* ===== v0.10.3 Story Gallery × Chat Entry ===== */
.story-active-bar{
  margin:0 0 12px;
  padding:13px 15px;
  border-radius:22px;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,#fff7fa,#f3edff);
  border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.16);
  box-shadow:0 8px 18px rgba(128,72,100,.07);
  display:flex;
  justify-content:space-between;
  align-items:center;
  gap:10px;
  flex-wrap:wrap;
}
.story-active-bar strong{color:#8c4a61;}
.story-active-bar .story-active-meta{color:#8b717b;font-size:12px;line-height:1.65;font-weight:850;}
.story-active-bar.empty{display:none;}
.story-workbench{display:grid;gap:14px;}
.story-toolbar{display:flex;gap:9px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;}
.story-toolbar .story-search{min-width:220px;flex:1 1 260px;}
.story-library{
  display:grid;
  grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(260px,1fr));
  gap:13px;
}
.story-card-v103{
  padding:15px;
  border-radius:22px;
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.72);
  border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.15);
  box-shadow:0 8px 18px rgba(128,72,100,.08);
  display:flex;
  flex-direction:column;
  gap:10px;
}
.story-card-v103.active-story{
  outline:2px solid rgba(215,127,153,.38);
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,#fff,#fff3f8);
}
.story-card-v103 h3{margin:0;color:#49343d;line-height:1.35;}
.story-card-v103 p{margin:0;color:#8b717b;line-height:1.75;font-size:13px;}
.story-card-v103 .story-card-actions{display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:auto;}
.story-config-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr));gap:10px;}
.story-config-grid label.full{grid-column:1/-1;}
.story-detail-box{
  display:none;
  padding:12px;
  border-radius:18px;
  background:#fff8fb;
  border:1px dashed rgba(151,91,113,.20);
}
.story-detail-box.show{display:block;}
.story-detail-box dl{margin:0;display:grid;gap:8px;}
.story-detail-box dt{font-weight:950;color:#8c4a61;font-size:12px;}
.story-detail-box dd{margin:2px 0 0;color:#765160;line-height:1.65;font-size:13px;white-space:pre-wrap;}
.story-current-chip{
  display:inline-flex;
  align-items:center;
  gap:6px;
  padding:5px 9px;
  border-radius:999px;
  background:#dff6e9;
  color:#4c9670;
  font-size:11px;
  font-weight:950;
}
@media(max-width:760px){
  .story-config-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
  .story-toolbar{align-items:stretch;}
  .story-toolbar .story-search{min-width:0;flex:1 1 100%;}
  .story-card-v103 .story-card-actions .btn,
  .story-card-v103 .story-card-actions .send{flex:1 1 calc(50% - 8px);}
  .story-active-bar{align-items:stretch;}
  .story-active-bar .v08-actions{width:100%;}
}



/* ===== v0.10.4 Home Dashboard × Return Ritual ===== */
.home-dashboard-v104{display:grid;gap:14px;margin-bottom:16px;}
.home-ritual-v104{position:relative;overflow:hidden;padding:20px;border-radius:28px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(255,255,255,.80),rgba(255,226,237,.70) 48%,rgba(244,237,255,.72));border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.16);box-shadow:var(--soft);}
.home-ritual-v104:after{content:"";position:absolute;right:-50px;top:-50px;width:150px;height:150px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(215,127,153,.16);pointer-events:none;}
.home-ritual-v104 h3{margin:0 0 8px;font-size:24px;color:#503843;}
.home-ritual-v104 p{margin:0;color:#765b66;line-height:1.75;font-size:13px;position:relative;z-index:1;}
.home-ritual-actions-v104{display:flex;gap:9px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:13px;position:relative;z-index:1;}
.home-ritual-message-v104{display:none;margin-top:13px;padding:13px 14px;border-radius:20px;background:#fff8fb;border:1px dashed rgba(151,91,113,.24);color:#6e4a58;line-height:1.75;font-weight:850;white-space:pre-wrap;position:relative;z-index:1;}
.home-ritual-message-v104.show{display:block;}
.dashboard-grid-v104{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr));gap:13px;}
.dashboard-card-v104{padding:15px;border-radius:23px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.72);border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.14);box-shadow:0 8px 18px rgba(128,72,100,.07);display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:9px;min-height:150px;}
.dashboard-card-v104 h3{margin:0;font-size:16px;color:#4f3640;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;}
.dashboard-card-v104 .dash-main{color:#6c4c58;line-height:1.65;font-size:13px;white-space:pre-wrap;flex:1;}
.dashboard-card-v104 .dash-meta{color:#9b7b86;font-size:12px;font-weight:850;line-height:1.55;}
.dashboard-card-v104 .dash-list{display:grid;gap:6px;margin:0;padding:0;list-style:none;}
.dashboard-card-v104 .dash-list li{padding:7px 8px;border-radius:13px;background:#fff8fb;border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.10);color:#6c4c58;font-size:12px;line-height:1.45;}
.dashboard-card-v104 .dash-actions{display:flex;gap:7px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:auto;}
.dashboard-card-v104 .dash-actions .btn,.dashboard-card-v104 .dash-actions .send{padding:8px 10px;font-size:12px;border-radius:999px;}
.dashboard-wide-v104{grid-column:span 2;}
.home-room-title-v104{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin:4px 0 12px;}
.home-room-title-v104 h3{margin:0;font-size:18px;color:#4f3640;}
.home-room-title-v104 span{font-size:12px;color:#9c7a84;font-weight:850;}
@media(max-width:1180px){.dashboard-grid-v104{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr));}.dashboard-wide-v104{grid-column:span 2;}}
@media(max-width:760px){.dashboard-grid-v104{grid-template-columns:1fr;}.dashboard-wide-v104{grid-column:auto;}.home-ritual-actions-v104 .btn,.home-ritual-actions-v104 .send,.dashboard-card-v104 .dash-actions .btn,.dashboard-card-v104 .dash-actions .send{flex:1 1 100%;}.home-ritual-v104{padding:16px;border-radius:24px;}.home-ritual-v104 h3{font-size:21px;}}



/* ===== v0.10.7 Backup Check & Import Preview ===== */
.backup-v107-wrap{display:grid;gap:14px;margin-top:14px}
.backup-v107-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(190px,1fr));gap:10px}
.backup-v107-card{padding:14px;border-radius:20px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#fff,#fff8fb);border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.14);box-shadow:0 8px 18px rgba(128,72,100,.07)}
.backup-v107-card strong{display:block;color:#5f3b48;font-size:14px;margin-bottom:4px}
.backup-v107-card .num{font-size:28px;font-weight:950;color:#8c4a61;line-height:1.2}
.backup-v107-card .hint{font-size:12px;color:#9a7b85;line-height:1.55;margin-top:4px;font-weight:800}
.backup-v107-actions{display:flex;gap:9px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center}
.backup-v107-actions label.btn{cursor:pointer;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center}
.backup-v107-panel{padding:15px;border-radius:22px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.72);border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.14);box-shadow:0 8px 18px rgba(128,72,100,.07)}
.backup-v107-title{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:10px;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:10px}
.backup-v107-title h3{margin:0;color:#46303a}
.backup-v107-status{min-height:22px;font-size:13px;color:#8b6571;font-weight:850;line-height:1.6}
.backup-v107-table{width:100%;border-collapse:separate;border-spacing:0 8px;min-width:0;font-size:13px}
.backup-v107-table th{position:static;background:transparent;color:#8c4a61;font-size:12px;padding:0 9px 3px;border:0;white-space:nowrap}
.backup-v107-table td{padding:10px 9px;border:0;background:#fff8fb;color:#674853;vertical-align:middle}
.backup-v107-table tr td:first-child{border-radius:14px 0 0 14px;font-weight:900}
.backup-v107-table tr td:last-child{border-radius:0 14px 14px 0;color:#9a7b85}
.backup-v107-pill{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;min-width:48px;padding:4px 8px;border-radius:999px;background:#f5dce5;color:#9a5367;font-weight:950;font-size:12px}
.backup-v107-pill.good{background:#dff6e9;color:#4c9670}.backup-v107-pill.warn{background:#fff0c9;color:#a7762e}.backup-v107-pill.soft{background:#e7e1ff;color:#715da4}
.backup-v107-import-box{display:none;margin-top:12px}.backup-v107-import-box.show{display:block}
.backup-v107-note{padding:12px 14px;border-radius:18px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#fff7fa,#f6efff);border:1px dashed rgba(151,91,113,.22);color:#765160;line-height:1.7;font-size:13px}
@media(max-width:760px){.backup-v107-actions .btn,.backup-v107-actions .send{flex:1 1 100%;text-align:center}.backup-v107-table{font-size:12px}.backup-v107-table th:nth-child(4),.backup-v107-table td:nth-child(4){display:none}.backup-v107-card .num{font-size:24px}}



/* ===== v0.10.9 Backup Import Clarity Fix ===== */
.backup-v108-warning{
  margin:12px 0;
  padding:12px 14px;
  border-radius:18px;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,#fff7fa,#f4edff);
  border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.15);
  color:#765160;
  line-height:1.7;
  font-size:13px;
  font-weight:800;
}
.backup-v108-primary-label{
  display:inline-flex!important;
  align-items:center;
  justify-content:center;
  padding:12px 16px!important;
  border-radius:999px!important;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,#ce7891,#9c6bd7)!important;
  color:#fff!important;
  border:0!important;
  box-shadow:0 10px 22px rgba(128,72,100,.16)!important;
  font-weight:950!important;
}
#v08BackupBox.backup-v108-hidden{display:none!important;}



/* ===== v0.10.9 PWA / App Prep ===== */
.pwa-splash-screen{
  position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:10000;display:grid;place-items:center;padding:24px;
  background:radial-gradient(circle at 18% 10%,rgba(255,255,255,.98) 0 10%,transparent 28%),radial-gradient(circle at 82% 18%,rgba(255,210,228,.92) 0 12%,transparent 32%),linear-gradient(135deg,#fff2f8,#f2e9ff 58%,#e9f7ff);
  transition:opacity .45s ease,transform .45s ease;will-change:opacity,transform;
}
.pwa-splash-screen.hide{opacity:0;pointer-events:none;transform:scale(1.025)}
.pwa-splash-card{width:min(420px,100%);padding:28px 24px;border-radius:32px;text-align:center;background:rgba(255,255,255,.88);border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.22);box-shadow:0 24px 70px rgba(128,72,100,.22);backdrop-filter:blur(16px)}
.pwa-splash-icon,.pwa-app-icon-preview{margin:0 auto 14px;width:86px;height:86px;border-radius:28px;display:block;object-fit:cover;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 15px 34px rgba(128,72,100,.20);background:#fff} .pwa-splash-icon img,.pwa-app-icon-preview img{width:100%;height:100%;display:block;object-fit:cover;border-radius:inherit}
.pwa-splash-card h1{margin:0 0 8px;font-size:27px;color:#53343f}.pwa-splash-card p{margin:0;color:#8b717b;line-height:1.75;font-size:14px}
.pwa-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(240px,1fr));gap:13px;margin-top:14px}.pwa-card{padding:15px;border-radius:22px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.68);border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.15);box-shadow:0 8px 18px rgba(128,72,100,.08)}
.pwa-card h3{margin:0 0 10px;color:#46303a}.pwa-card p,.pwa-card li{color:#7e6670;line-height:1.75;font-size:13px}.pwa-card ul{margin:8px 0 0;padding-left:20px}.pwa-actions{display:flex;gap:9px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:12px}.pwa-actions .btn,.pwa-actions .send{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center}
.pwa-checklist{display:grid;gap:8px}.pwa-check{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:10px;align-items:center;padding:9px 10px;border-radius:15px;background:#fff8fb;border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.12);font-size:13px;font-weight:850;color:#674853}.pwa-check span:last-child{white-space:nowrap}.pwa-good{color:#4c9670;background:#dff6e9;border-radius:999px;padding:4px 9px;font-size:12px}.pwa-wait{color:#a7762e;background:#fff0c9;border-radius:999px;padding:4px 9px;font-size:12px}.pwa-soft{color:#715da4;background:#e7e1ff;border-radius:999px;padding:4px 9px;font-size:12px}
.pwa-step-list{counter-reset:pwaStep;display:grid;gap:10px;margin-top:10px}.pwa-step{counter-increment:pwaStep;padding:12px 13px 12px 48px;border-radius:18px;background:#fff8fb;border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.13);position:relative;color:#765160;line-height:1.65;font-size:13px}.pwa-step:before{content:counter(pwaStep);position:absolute;left:13px;top:12px;width:24px;height:24px;border-radius:999px;display:grid;place-items:center;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#ce7891,#9c6bd7);color:#fff;font-weight:950;font-size:12px}
.pwa-preview-phone{width:min(220px,100%);margin:8px auto 0;padding:12px;border-radius:28px;background:#2f293a;box-shadow:0 18px 40px rgba(64,35,54,.18)}.pwa-preview-screen{border-radius:20px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#fff3f8,#f3edff);padding:16px;text-align:center}.pwa-preview-screen .small-note{font-size:12px;color:#8b717b;line-height:1.55}
.pwa-status{min-height:20px;color:#9d5870;font-size:12px;font-weight:850;line-height:1.6;margin-top:8px}
@media(max-width:760px){.pwa-splash-card{padding:24px 20px}.pwa-actions .btn,.pwa-actions .send{flex:1 1 100%}.pwa-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}.pwa-step{font-size:12px}}


/* ===== v0.10.12 Scenario Chat Upgrade ===== */
.scene-chat-wrap{display:grid;gap:14px;}
.scene-chat-hero{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px;align-items:flex-start;flex-wrap:wrap;padding:18px 18px;border-radius:26px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(255,255,255,.86),rgba(255,239,247,.70));border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.16);box-shadow:var(--soft)}
.scene-chat-hero h3{margin:0 0 7px;font-size:25px;color:#44323a;line-height:1.35}.scene-chat-hero p{margin:0;color:#8b717b;line-height:1.75;font-size:14px}.scene-chat-hero .scene-online{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;white-space:nowrap;padding:9px 12px;border-radius:999px;background:#fff8fb;border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.14);font-weight:950;color:#8c4a61}.scene-dot{width:9px;height:9px;border-radius:999px;background:#70d79a;box-shadow:0 0 0 5px rgba(112,215,154,.16)}
.scene-chat-shell{height:calc(100vh - 190px);min-height:620px;}
.scene-status-strip{padding:12px 14px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr auto;gap:10px;align-items:center;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(255,248,251,.92),rgba(246,238,255,.62));}
.scene-status-main{display:grid;gap:3px}.scene-status-title{font-weight:950;color:#553642}.scene-status-sub{font-size:12px;color:#8b717b;line-height:1.55}.scene-status-actions{display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:flex-end}.scene-status-actions .btn{padding:8px 10px;border-radius:999px;font-size:12px}
.scene-chat-list{background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(255,246,250,.70),rgba(242,235,255,.55));}
.scene-chat-list .msg{max-width:84%}.scene-chat-list .bubble{white-space:pre-wrap}.scene-chat-list .bubble.scene-system{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#fff8fb,#f0e9ff);border:1px dashed rgba(151,91,113,.25);color:#6f4d5a}.scene-chat-list .bubble.scene-card{background:#fff;border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.16)}
.scene-chat-list .bubble img.scene-chat-img{display:block;max-width:min(260px,100%);border-radius:18px;margin:4px 0 8px;box-shadow:var(--soft)}
.scene-meta-line{margin-top:7px;font-size:11px;color:#a58591;display:flex;gap:7px;align-items:center;justify-content:flex-start;flex-wrap:wrap}.user .scene-meta-line{color:rgba(255,255,255,.80);justify-content:flex-end}.scene-read{font-weight:900;opacity:.9}.scene-kind{font-weight:900;opacity:.88}
.scene-tool-panel{display:none;padding:12px 14px;border-top:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.13);background:rgba(255,250,252,.75)}.scene-tool-panel.show{display:block}.scene-tools-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(5,minmax(0,1fr));gap:9px}.scene-tool-btn{min-height:72px;border-radius:20px;background:#fff;border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.14);box-shadow:0 8px 18px rgba(128,72,100,.06);display:grid;place-items:center;gap:4px;color:#7b5360;font-weight:950;cursor:pointer}.scene-tool-btn span{font-size:25px}.scene-tool-btn small{font-size:12px;color:#8b717b;font-weight:850}.scene-transfer-form{display:none;margin-top:10px;padding:12px;border-radius:20px;background:#fff8fb;border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.13);gap:8px}.scene-transfer-form.show{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr auto;align-items:end}.scene-transfer-form .full{grid-column:1/-1}.scene-transfer-form .btn,.scene-transfer-form .send{height:42px}
.scene-composer{grid-template-columns:auto 1fr auto auto}.scene-plus-btn{width:46px;height:46px;border-radius:999px;font-size:22px;padding:0}.scene-typing{align-self:flex-start;margin:4px 0 0 48px;padding:9px 13px;border-radius:999px;background:#fff8fb;border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.13);color:#8c4a61;font-size:12px;font-weight:900;box-shadow:var(--soft)}.scene-typing .dots{letter-spacing:2px;animation:sceneDots 1.1s infinite}@keyframes sceneDots{0%,20%{opacity:.25}50%{opacity:1}100%{opacity:.25}}
@media(max-width:860px){.scene-chat-hero{padding:15px}.scene-chat-hero h3{font-size:22px}.scene-chat-shell{height:calc(100vh - 145px);min-height:560px}.scene-status-strip{grid-template-columns:1fr}.scene-status-actions{justify-content:flex-start}.scene-tools-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr)}.scene-transfer-form.show{grid-template-columns:1fr}.scene-composer{grid-template-columns:auto 1fr}.scene-composer #sceneSendBtn,.scene-composer #sceneMockReplyBtn{grid-column:auto / span 1}.scene-chat-list .msg{max-width:92%}}
@media(max-width:430px){.scene-tools-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr)}.scene-tool-btn{min-height:66px}.scene-tool-btn span{font-size:22px}.scene-tool-btn small{font-size:11px}.scene-composer{grid-template-columns:auto 1fr}.scene-composer #sceneSendBtn,.scene-composer #sceneMockReplyBtn{width:100%;grid-column:1/-1}.scene-chat-list{padding:13px}}


/* ===== v0.10.12 Soul Bank × Tool Upgrade ===== */
.scene-transfer-receipt{border-radius:22px;overflow:hidden;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#111827,#2d2446 55%,#7e4d78);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.26);box-shadow:0 16px 35px rgba(35,18,35,.18);color:#fff;min-width:min(320px,100%)}
.scene-transfer-receipt .receipt-head{padding:14px 15px 10px;text-align:center;background:radial-gradient(circle at 20% 20%,rgba(123,203,255,.22),transparent 34%),radial-gradient(circle at 82% 12%,rgba(255,150,203,.25),transparent 35%)}
.scene-transfer-receipt .receipt-bank{font-size:18px;font-weight:950;letter-spacing:.12em;text-shadow:0 2px 10px rgba(255,255,255,.28)}
.scene-transfer-receipt .receipt-status{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;margin-top:8px;padding:6px 12px;border-radius:999px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.16);font-size:12px;font-weight:950;color:#ffe3f0}.scene-transfer-receipt .receipt-status:before{content:'✓';display:grid;place-items:center;width:18px;height:18px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(255,255,255,.22)}
.scene-transfer-receipt .receipt-avatars{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:12px;margin:12px 0}.scene-transfer-receipt .receipt-avatar{width:48px;height:48px;border-radius:999px;display:grid;place-items:center;font-size:24px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.35);background:rgba(255,255,255,.13)}.scene-transfer-receipt .receipt-arrow{font-size:22px;color:#ffd5e6}
.scene-transfer-receipt .receipt-body{padding:12px 15px 14px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.08);display:grid;gap:8px}.scene-transfer-receipt .receipt-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:88px 1fr;gap:10px;border-bottom:1px dashed rgba(255,255,255,.20);padding-bottom:7px}.scene-transfer-receipt .receipt-row:last-child{border-bottom:0;padding-bottom:0}.scene-transfer-receipt .receipt-label{color:rgba(255,255,255,.68);font-size:12px;font-weight:850}.scene-transfer-receipt .receipt-value{font-weight:900;text-align:right;color:#fff}.scene-transfer-receipt .receipt-amount{font-size:21px;color:#ffd7e9;letter-spacing:.04em}.scene-transfer-receipt .receipt-foot{padding:10px 14px;text-align:center;font-size:12px;color:#ffe5f0;background:rgba(255,255,255,.08)}
.scene-prop-card-view{display:grid;grid-template-columns:auto 1fr;gap:10px;align-items:center;min-width:min(280px,100%);padding:12px;border-radius:20px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#fff8fb,#f1ebff);border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.16);box-shadow:var(--soft)}.scene-prop-card-view .prop-icon{width:48px;height:48px;border-radius:16px;display:grid;place-items:center;font-size:26px;background:#fff;border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.12)}.scene-prop-card-view strong{display:block;color:#553642;margin-bottom:3px}.scene-prop-card-view span{color:#8b717b;font-size:12px;line-height:1.55}
.scene-prop-form{display:none;margin-top:10px;padding:12px;border-radius:20px;background:#fff8fb;border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.13);gap:10px}.scene-prop-form.show{display:grid}.scene-prop-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,minmax(0,1fr));gap:8px}.scene-prop-pill{border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.13);background:#fff;border-radius:16px;min-height:54px;display:grid;place-items:center;gap:2px;font-weight:950;color:#74515d;cursor:pointer}.scene-prop-pill span{font-size:22px}.scene-prop-pill small{font-size:11px;color:#8b717b}.scene-prop-custom{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr auto auto;gap:8px;align-items:end}.scene-prop-custom label{display:grid;gap:6px}.scene-prop-custom input{width:100%}
.soul-bank-wrap{display:grid;gap:14px}.soul-bank-hero{border-radius:30px;padding:22px;background:radial-gradient(circle at 18% 10%,rgba(119,201,255,.25),transparent 26%),radial-gradient(circle at 86% 20%,rgba(255,146,203,.28),transparent 30%),linear-gradient(135deg,#111827,#2d2344 58%,#6f496f);color:#fff;box-shadow:0 20px 48px rgba(46,26,50,.20);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.22);position:relative;overflow:hidden}.soul-bank-hero:after{content:'✦';position:absolute;right:24px;top:18px;font-size:90px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.08)}.soul-bank-hero h3{margin:0 0 6px;font-size:30px;letter-spacing:.08em}.soul-bank-hero p{margin:0;color:rgba(255,255,255,.78);line-height:1.75}.bank-stats{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(150px,1fr));gap:10px;margin-top:16px}.bank-stat{padding:12px;border-radius:20px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.12);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.18);backdrop-filter:blur(8px)}.bank-stat strong{display:block;font-size:22px}.bank-stat span{font-size:12px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.75);font-weight:850}
.soul-bank-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:14px}.soul-bank-card{padding:16px;border-radius:24px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.78);border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.15);box-shadow:var(--soft)}.soul-bank-card h3{margin:0 0 10px;color:#44323a}.soul-bank-card p{color:#8b717b;line-height:1.7}.bank-wide{grid-column:1/-1}.bank-actions{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;margin-top:12px}.bank-record-list,.bank-prop-list{display:grid;gap:9px;max-height:360px;overflow:auto;padding-right:3px}.bank-record-item,.bank-prop-item{padding:12px;border-radius:18px;background:#fff8fb;border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.13);display:grid;gap:6px}.bank-record-top{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:10px;align-items:center}.bank-record-amount{font-weight:950;color:#b44f70}.bank-record-note{color:#644653;line-height:1.55;font-size:13px}.bank-record-meta{font-size:11px;color:#9d7d89;display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap}.bank-prop-item{grid-template-columns:auto 1fr;align-items:center}.bank-prop-icon{width:42px;height:42px;border-radius:14px;background:#fff;display:grid;place-items:center;font-size:23px;border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.12)}.bank-empty{padding:14px;border-radius:18px;background:#fff8fb;color:#8b717b;border:1px dashed rgba(151,91,113,.20);line-height:1.7}.bank-detail-preview{display:grid;place-items:center}.bank-detail-card{width:min(560px,100%);border-radius:28px;padding:18px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#121827,#2b2444 50%,#744c74);color:#fff;box-shadow:0 24px 60px rgba(25,18,45,.25);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.22)}.bank-detail-title{text-align:center;font-size:28px;font-weight:950;letter-spacing:.12em;margin-bottom:12px}.bank-detail-avatars{display:flex;justify-content:center;align-items:center;gap:18px;margin:12px 0 15px}.bank-detail-avatar{display:grid;place-items:center;width:82px;height:82px;border-radius:999px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.12);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.25);font-size:42px}.bank-detail-arrow{font-size:32px;color:#ffd6e8}.bank-detail-status{text-align:center;font-size:22px;font-weight:950;color:#ffe3ef;margin:8px 0}.bank-detail-rows{display:grid;gap:0;border-radius:22px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.10);padding:10px 14px}.bank-detail-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:110px 1fr;gap:10px;padding:10px 0;border-bottom:1px dashed rgba(255,255,255,.20)}.bank-detail-row:last-child{border-bottom:0}.bank-detail-row span{color:rgba(255,255,255,.72);font-weight:850}.bank-detail-row strong{text-align:right}.bank-detail-foot{text-align:center;margin-top:12px;color:#ffe1ef;font-size:13px;line-height:1.7}
@media(max-width:860px){.soul-bank-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}.scene-prop-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr)}.scene-prop-custom{grid-template-columns:1fr}.soul-bank-hero h3{font-size:24px}.bank-detail-title{font-size:23px}.bank-detail-avatar{width:66px;height:66px;font-size:34px}.bank-detail-row{grid-template-columns:92px 1fr}.bank-record-list,.bank-prop-list{max-height:none}}


/* ===== v0.10.13 Soul Bank Avatar × Prop Detail Upgrade ===== */
.bank-avatar-wolf,.bank-avatar-cat{
  background-size:cover!important;background-position:center!important;background-repeat:no-repeat!important;
  color:transparent!important;font-size:0!important;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 0 0 2px rgba(255,255,255,.32),0 10px 22px rgba(10,15,30,.24);
}
.bank-avatar-wolf{background-image:url("data:image/webp;base64,")!important;}
.bank-avatar-cat{background-image:url("data:image/webp;base64,")!important;}
.scene-transfer-receipt .receipt-avatar.bank-avatar-wolf,
.scene-transfer-receipt .receipt-avatar.bank-avatar-cat{width:54px;height:54px;border-radius:999px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.45);background-color:rgba(255,255,255,.12)}
.bank-detail-avatar.bank-avatar-wolf,.bank-detail-avatar.bank-avatar-cat{width:70px;height:70px;border-radius:999px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.32);background-color:rgba(255,255,255,.12)}
.bank-prop-item{cursor:pointer;transition:.16s ease}
.bank-prop-item:hover,.bank-prop-item.active{transform:translateY(-1px);background:linear-gradient(135deg,#fff4f8,#f2ecff);box-shadow:var(--soft)}
.bank-prop-detail-card{
  border-radius:28px;overflow:hidden;background:radial-gradient(circle at 14% 8%,rgba(119,201,255,.22),transparent 28%),radial-gradient(circle at 82% 12%,rgba(255,146,203,.24),transparent 30%),linear-gradient(135deg,#111827,#2d2446 58%,#744b76);
  color:#fff;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.22);box-shadow:0 18px 40px rgba(46,26,50,.20);
}
.bank-prop-detail-head{padding:18px 18px 12px;text-align:center}
.bank-prop-detail-title{font-size:24px;font-weight:950;letter-spacing:.1em;text-shadow:0 2px 12px rgba(255,255,255,.22)}
.bank-prop-detail-sub{margin-top:7px;color:#ffe6f1;font-size:12px;font-weight:850}
.bank-prop-detail-icon{width:92px;height:92px;border-radius:28px;margin:14px auto 0;display:grid;place-items:center;font-size:52px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.14);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.28);box-shadow:inset 0 0 22px rgba(255,255,255,.12)}
.bank-prop-detail-body{padding:14px 18px 18px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.08);display:grid;gap:9px}
.bank-prop-detail-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:92px 1fr;gap:12px;border-bottom:1px dashed rgba(255,255,255,.20);padding-bottom:8px;align-items:start}
.bank-prop-detail-row:last-child{border-bottom:0;padding-bottom:0}
.bank-prop-detail-row span{color:rgba(255,255,255,.68);font-size:12px;font-weight:850}
.bank-prop-detail-row strong{text-align:right;color:#fff;line-height:1.55}
.bank-prop-detail-foot{padding:11px 14px;text-align:center;color:#ffe6f1;font-size:12px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.08)}
@media(max-width:430px){
  .bank-detail-avatar.bank-avatar-wolf,.bank-detail-avatar.bank-avatar-cat{width:58px;height:58px}
  .bank-prop-detail-row{grid-template-columns:78px 1fr}
}


/* ===== v0.10.14 Scene Chat Token Monitor ===== */
.scene-token-monitor{
  margin-top:2px;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(255,247,250,.84),rgba(243,237,255,.74));
}
.scene-token-monitor .token-line > span:first-child{
  color:#8c4a61;
}
.scene-token-monitor .token-bar-fill{
  background:linear-gradient(90deg,#9c6bd7,#d77f99);
}
@media(max-width:760px){
  .scene-composer.tokenized .scene-token-monitor{
    grid-column:1 / -1 !important;
  }
}


/* ===== v0.10.15 Scene Clear Fix ===== */
.scene-clear-toast-v1015{
  position:fixed;left:50%;bottom:22px;transform:translateX(-50%);
  z-index:12000;padding:11px 16px;border-radius:999px;
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.92);border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.18);
  box-shadow:0 14px 32px rgba(128,72,100,.18);color:#8c4a61;
  font-size:13px;font-weight:900;backdrop-filter:blur(12px);
  animation:sceneClearToastV1015 1.9s ease forwards;
}
@keyframes sceneClearToastV1015{
  0%{opacity:0;transform:translate(-50%,10px)}
  14%,78%{opacity:1;transform:translate(-50%,0)}
  100%{opacity:0;transform:translate(-50%,10px)}
}


/* ===== v0.10.16 Composer Layout Fix × Bubble Actions ===== */
.composer.tokenized:not(.scene-composer){
  display:grid !important;
  grid-template-columns:minmax(320px,1fr) auto auto !important;
  align-items:end !important;
  gap:10px !important;
}
.composer.tokenized:not(.scene-composer) textarea{
  grid-column:1 / 2 !important;
  width:100% !important;
  min-height:92px !important;
}
.composer.tokenized:not(.scene-composer) #sendBubble,
.composer.tokenized:not(.scene-composer) #askReply{
  min-width:112px !important;
  height:54px !important;
  align-self:end !important;
}
.composer.tokenized:not(.scene-composer) .token-monitor{
  grid-column:1 / -1 !important;
}

.scene-composer.tokenized{
  display:grid !important;
  grid-template-columns:54px minmax(300px,1fr) auto auto !important;
  align-items:end !important;
  gap:10px !important;
}
.scene-composer.tokenized .scene-plus-btn{
  grid-column:1 / 2 !important;
  width:54px !important;
  height:54px !important;
  align-self:end !important;
}
.scene-composer.tokenized #sceneChatInput{
  grid-column:2 / 3 !important;
  width:100% !important;
  min-height:92px !important;
}
.scene-composer.tokenized #sceneSendBtn,
.scene-composer.tokenized #sceneMockReplyBtn{
  min-width:108px !important;
  height:54px !important;
  align-self:end !important;
}
.scene-composer.tokenized .scene-token-monitor{
  grid-column:1 / -1 !important;
}
.chat .bubble{
  position:relative;
}
.bubble-actions-v1016{
  display:flex;
  flex-wrap:wrap;
  gap:6px;
  margin-top:8px;
  opacity:.82;
}
.bubble-action-v1016{
  appearance:none;
  border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.16);
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.74);
  color:#8c4a61;
  border-radius:999px;
  padding:4px 8px;
  font:inherit;
  font-size:11px;
  font-weight:900;
  cursor:pointer;
}
.bubble-action-v1016:hover{
  background:#fff;
  box-shadow:0 6px 14px rgba(128,72,100,.12);
  transform:translateY(-1px);
}
@media(max-width:860px){
  .composer.tokenized:not(.scene-composer){
    grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr !important;
  }
  .composer.tokenized:not(.scene-composer) textarea{
    grid-column:1 / -1 !important;
    min-height:118px !important;
  }
  .composer.tokenized:not(.scene-composer) #sendBubble,
  .composer.tokenized:not(.scene-composer) #askReply{
    width:100% !important;
    min-width:0 !important;
  }
  .scene-composer.tokenized{
    grid-template-columns:54px minmax(0,1fr) !important;
  }
  .scene-composer.tokenized .scene-plus-btn{
    grid-column:1 / 2 !important;
    grid-row:1 !important;
  }
  .scene-composer.tokenized #sceneChatInput{
    grid-column:2 / 3 !important;
    grid-row:1 !important;
    min-height:118px !important;
  }
  .scene-composer.tokenized #sceneSendBtn{
    grid-column:1 / 2 !important;
    grid-row:2 !important;
    width:100% !important;
    min-width:0 !important;
  }
  .scene-composer.tokenized #sceneMockReplyBtn{
    grid-column:2 / 3 !important;
    grid-row:2 !important;
    width:100% !important;
    min-width:0 !important;
  }
  .scene-composer.tokenized .scene-token-monitor{
    grid-column:1 / -1 !important;
    grid-row:3 !important;
  }
}
@media(max-width:430px){
  .bubble-actions-v1016{
    gap:5px;
  }
  .bubble-action-v1016{
    flex:1 1 auto;
    padding:5px 7px;
  }
}


/* ===== v0.10.17 Compact Reply Button Fix ===== */
.reply-mini-v1017{
  white-space:nowrap !important;
  overflow:visible !important;
  text-overflow:clip !important;
}
.composer.tokenized:not(.scene-composer){
  grid-template-columns:minmax(320px,1fr) auto auto !important;
}
.composer.tokenized:not(.scene-composer) #sendBubble{
  min-width:98px !important;
}
.composer.tokenized:not(.scene-composer) #askReply.reply-mini-v1017{
  min-width:82px !important;
  width:auto !important;
  padding-inline:16px !important;
  border-radius:22px !important;
}
.scene-composer.tokenized{
  grid-template-columns:54px minmax(260px,1fr) 92px 58px !important;
}
.scene-composer.tokenized #sceneSendBtn{
  min-width:92px !important;
}
.scene-composer.tokenized #sceneMockReplyBtn.reply-mini-v1017{
  min-width:54px !important;
  width:54px !important;
  padding:0 !important;
  border-radius:999px !important;
  font-size:18px !important;
  font-weight:950 !important;
  display:grid !important;
  place-items:center !important;
}
@media(max-width:860px){
  .composer.tokenized:not(.scene-composer) #askReply.reply-mini-v1017{
    min-width:0 !important;
    width:100% !important;
    border-radius:20px !important;
  }
  .scene-composer.tokenized{
    grid-template-columns:54px minmax(0,1fr) !important;
  }
  .scene-composer.tokenized #sceneSendBtn{
    grid-column:1 / 2 !important;
    min-width:0 !important;
    width:100% !important;
  }
  .scene-composer.tokenized #sceneMockReplyBtn.reply-mini-v1017{
    grid-column:2 / 3 !important;
    min-width:0 !important;
    width:100% !important;
    height:54px !important;
    border-radius:20px !important;
    font-size:16px !important;
  }
  .scene-composer.tokenized #sceneMockReplyBtn.reply-mini-v1017::after{
    content:" 月回覆";
    font-size:16px;
  }
}
@media(max-width:430px){
  .scene-composer.tokenized #sceneMockReplyBtn.reply-mini-v1017::after{
    content:"回覆";
  }
}


/* ===== v0.10.18 Compact App Composer × Mobile Crop Fix ===== */
.chat-shell,.composer,.composer textarea,.main,.content{
  box-sizing:border-box;
  min-width:0;
  max-width:100%;
}
.composer.tokenized:not(.scene-composer){
  grid-template-columns:minmax(260px,1fr) 88px 50px !important;
  gap:10px !important;
  overflow:hidden !important;
}
.composer.tokenized:not(.scene-composer) textarea{
  grid-column:1 / 2 !important;
  min-width:0 !important;
  width:100% !important;
}
.send-compact-v1018{
  white-space:nowrap !important;
  min-width:78px !important;
  padding-inline:18px !important;
}
.composer.tokenized:not(.scene-composer) #sendBubble.send-compact-v1018{
  grid-column:2 / 3 !important;
  min-width:78px !important;
}
.reply-wolf-v1018{
  width:50px !important;
  min-width:50px !important;
  height:54px !important;
  padding:0 !important;
  border-radius:999px !important;
  background-size:cover !important;
  background-position:center !important;
  border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.18) !important;
  box-shadow:0 10px 22px rgba(128,72,100,.13) !important;
  overflow:hidden !important;
}
.composer.tokenized:not(.scene-composer) #askReply.reply-wolf-v1018{
  grid-column:3 / 4 !important;
}
.scene-composer.tokenized{
  grid-template-columns:46px minmax(240px,1fr) 86px 50px !important;
  gap:9px !important;
  overflow:hidden !important;
}
.scene-composer.tokenized .scene-plus-btn{
  width:46px !important;
  min-width:46px !important;
  height:46px !important;
  border-radius:999px !important;
  font-size:28px !important;
  padding:0 !important;
  align-self:center !important;
}
.scene-composer.tokenized #sceneChatInput{
  min-width:0 !important;
  width:100% !important;
}
.scene-composer.tokenized #sceneSendBtn.send-compact-v1018{
  min-width:78px !important;
  width:86px !important;
  padding-inline:12px !important;
}
.scene-composer.tokenized #sceneMockReplyBtn.reply-wolf-v1018{
  width:50px !important;
  min-width:50px !important;
  height:54px !important;
}
.scene-composer.tokenized .scene-token-monitor{
  grid-column:1 / -1 !important;
}
@media(max-width:860px){
  html,body,.app,.panel,.main,.content{
    max-width:100vw !important;
    overflow-x:hidden !important;
  }
  .chat-shell{
    width:100% !important;
    max-width:100% !important;
    overflow:hidden !important;
  }
  .chat{
    width:100% !important;
    max-width:100% !important;
    overflow-x:hidden !important;
  }
  .chat .msg{
    max-width:100% !important;
    min-width:0 !important;
  }
  .chat .bubble{
    max-width:calc(100% - 58px) !important;
    overflow-wrap:anywhere !important;
    word-break:break-word !important;
  }
  .composer.tokenized:not(.scene-composer){
    grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) 50px !important;
    gap:8px !important;
    padding-inline:8px !important;
  }
  .composer.tokenized:not(.scene-composer) textarea{
    grid-column:1 / -1 !important;
    grid-row:1 !important;
    min-height:112px !important;
  }
  .composer.tokenized:not(.scene-composer) #sendBubble.send-compact-v1018{
    grid-column:1 / 2 !important;
    grid-row:2 !important;
    width:100% !important;
    min-width:0 !important;
    height:50px !important;
  }
  .composer.tokenized:not(.scene-composer) #askReply.reply-wolf-v1018{
    grid-column:2 / 3 !important;
    grid-row:2 !important;
    width:50px !important;
    min-width:50px !important;
    height:50px !important;
  }
  .composer.tokenized:not(.scene-composer) .token-monitor{
    grid-column:1 / -1 !important;
    grid-row:3 !important;
  }
  .scene-composer.tokenized{
    grid-template-columns:44px minmax(0,1fr) 50px !important;
    gap:8px !important;
    padding-inline:8px !important;
  }
  .scene-composer.tokenized .scene-plus-btn{
    grid-column:1 / 2 !important;
    grid-row:1 !important;
    width:44px !important;
    min-width:44px !important;
    height:44px !important;
    font-size:26px !important;
    align-self:center !important;
  }
  .scene-composer.tokenized #sceneChatInput{
    grid-column:2 / 4 !important;
    grid-row:1 !important;
    min-height:112px !important;
  }
  .scene-composer.tokenized #sceneSendBtn.send-compact-v1018{
    grid-column:1 / 3 !important;
    grid-row:2 !important;
    width:100% !important;
    min-width:0 !important;
    height:50px !important;
  }
  .scene-composer.tokenized #sceneMockReplyBtn.reply-wolf-v1018{
    grid-column:3 / 4 !important;
    grid-row:2 !important;
    width:50px !important;
    min-width:50px !important;
    height:50px !important;
    border-radius:999px !important;
  }
  .scene-composer.tokenized .scene-token-monitor{
    grid-column:1 / -1 !important;
    grid-row:3 !important;
  }
}
@media(max-width:430px){

  .scene-composer.tokenized{

  }
  .chat .bubble{
    max-width:calc(100% - 50px) !important;
  }
}


/* ===== v0.10.19 Main Chat Online Status × Read Time ===== */
.main-chat-status-v1019{
  display:flex;
  justify-content:space-between;
  align-items:center;
  gap:12px;
  padding:12px 14px;
  border-bottom:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.13);
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(255,247,250,.88),rgba(244,238,255,.76));
}
.main-chat-status-left-v1019{
  display:flex;
  align-items:center;
  gap:10px;
  min-width:0;
}
.main-chat-status-avatar-v1019{
  width:42px;
  height:42px;
  border-radius:16px;
  box-shadow:0 10px 22px rgba(128,72,100,.13);
  flex:0 0 42px;
}
.main-chat-status-text-v1019{
  min-width:0;
}
.main-chat-status-title-v1019{
  display:flex;
  align-items:center;
  gap:7px;
  color:#4b333d;
  font-weight:950;
  line-height:1.35;
}
.main-online-dot-v1019{
  width:10px;
  height:10px;
  border-radius:999px;
  background:#6ed99f;
  box-shadow:0 0 0 5px rgba(110,217,159,.16);
  flex:0 0 10px;
}
.main-chat-status-sub-v1019{
  color:#92727e;
  font-size:12px;
  font-weight:800;
  margin-top:2px;
  white-space:nowrap;
  overflow:hidden;
  text-overflow:ellipsis;
}
.main-chat-status-right-v1019{
  display:flex;
  gap:7px;
  flex-wrap:wrap;
  justify-content:flex-end;
}
.main-status-chip-v1019{
  display:inline-flex;
  align-items:center;
  gap:5px;
  padding:7px 10px;
  border-radius:999px;
  background:#fff;
  border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.13);
  color:#8c4a61;
  font-size:12px;
  font-weight:900;
}
.main-status-chip-v1019:last-child{
  color:#8a7180;
}
.main-chat-status-v1019 + .modes{
  border-top:0;
}
.meta .read-v1019,
.scene-meta-line .read-v1019{
  font-weight:950;
}
.meta .time-v1019{
  margin-left:4px;
}
@media(max-width:760px){
  .main-chat-status-v1019{
    align-items:flex-start;
    flex-direction:column;
    padding:12px;
  }
  .main-chat-status-right-v1019{
    width:100%;
    justify-content:flex-start;
  }
  .main-status-chip-v1019{
    flex:1 1 auto;
    justify-content:center;
  }
}


/* ===== v0.10.20 Main Chat Mode Bar Desktop Crop Fix ===== */
#chat .chat-shell{

}

}
#chat #modeBar{

  max-height:none !important;
  align-items:center !important;
  overflow-x:auto !important;
  overflow-y:hidden !important;
  padding:12px 14px !important;
  scrollbar-gutter:stable;
}
#chat #modeBar .btn{
  min-height:42px !important;
  display:inline-flex !important;
  align-items:center !important;
  justify-content:center !important;
  line-height:1.2 !important;

}
#chat #chatList{
  grid-row:3 !important;

}

}

  }

}


/* ===== v0.10.21 Main Chat Mode Tools ===== */
#chat .chat-shell{
  grid-template-rows:auto auto auto minmax(0,1fr) auto !important;
}
.main-mode-panel-v1021{
  grid-row:3 !important;
  padding:12px 14px;
  border-bottom:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.13);
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(255,251,253,.86),rgba(246,240,255,.72));
}
.main-mode-panel-inner-v1021{
  display:grid;

  gap:12px;

}

}
.main-mode-chip-v1021{

  padding:8px 11px;

}
#chat #chatList{

}

}
@media(max-width:860px){
  .main-mode-panel-inner-v1021{
    grid-template-columns:1fr;
  }
  .main-mode-quick-v1021{
    justify-content:flex-start;
  }

  }

  }

#chat .chat-shell{

.main-daily-tool-panel-v1023{

}
.main-daily-tool-panel-v1023.show{display:block;}
.main-daily-tool-head-v1023{
