  .main-tool-pill-v1023{flex:1 1 calc(50% - 8px);}
}

/* ===== v0.10.24 Slim Main Chat Tool Row × Music Settings ===== */
.main-daily-tool-panel-v1023{
  padding:10px 12px 8px!important;
}
.main-daily-tool-head-v1023{
  margin-bottom:8px!important;
}
.main-daily-tool-sub-v1023{
  line-height:1.45!important;
}
.main-daily-tools-grid-v1023{
  display:flex!important;
  grid-template-columns:none!important;
  flex-wrap:nowrap!important;
  gap:8px!important;
  overflow-x:auto!important;
  overflow-y:hidden!important;
  padding:2px 2px 8px!important;
  scroll-snap-type:x proximity;
  -webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch;
}
.main-daily-tools-grid-v1023::-webkit-scrollbar{height:6px;}
.main-daily-tools-grid-v1023::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:rgba(151,91,113,.18);border-radius:999px;}
.main-daily-tool-btn-v1023{
  flex:0 0 72px!important;
  width:72px!important;
  min-height:52px!important;
  border-radius:17px!important;
  padding:7px 6px!important;
  gap:2px!important;
  scroll-snap-align:start;
}
.main-daily-tool-btn-v1023 span{font-size:22px!important;line-height:1!important;}
.main-daily-tool-btn-v1023 small{font-size:10.5px!important;line-height:1.15!important;white-space:nowrap;}
.main-tool-form-v1023{margin-top:8px!important;}
@media(max-width:860px){
  .main-daily-tool-panel-v1023{padding:9px 10px 7px!important;}
  .main-daily-tool-btn-v1023{flex-basis:68px!important;width:68px!important;min-height:50px!important;}
  .main-daily-tool-btn-v1023 span{font-size:21px!important;}
  .main-daily-tool-btn-v1023 small{font-size:10px!important;}
}
@media(max-width:430px){
  .main-daily-tools-grid-v1023{gap:7px!important;}
  .main-daily-tool-btn-v1023{flex-basis:64px!important;width:64px!important;min-height:48px!important;}
}
.music-settings-v1024{display:grid;gap:14px;}
.music-card-v1024{position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
.music-card-v1024::after{content:"♪";position:absolute;right:18px;top:8px;font-size:86px;color:rgba(151,91,113,.08);font-weight:950;pointer-events:none;}
.music-presets-v1024{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;margin-top:10px;position:relative;z-index:1;}
.music-preset-v1024{appearance:none;border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.14);background:#fff;border-radius:999px;padding:9px 11px;color:#8c4a61;font:inherit;font-size:12px;font-weight:950;cursor:pointer;}
.music-preset-v1024:hover{background:#fff1f6;transform:translateY(-1px);}
.music-current-v1024{padding:13px 14px;border-radius:18px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#fff8fb,#f2ebff);border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.13);color:#6d4d59;line-height:1.7;font-size:13px;white-space:pre-wrap;position:relative;z-index:1;}
.music-status-v1024{min-height:20px;color:#9d5870;font-size:12px;font-weight:850;line-height:1.6;margin-top:8px;}
@media(max-width:760px){.music-presets-v1024 .music-preset-v1024{flex:1 1 calc(50% - 8px);}}



/* ===== v0.10.26 Mobile Bottom Nav × Side Drawer ===== */
.mobile-nav-v1026,
.mobile-drawer-scrim-v1026{display:none;}
@media(max-width:860px){
  body{padding-bottom:96px;}
  .app{
    width:100%!important;
    max-width:100%!important;
    margin:0!important;
    padding:12px!important;
    gap:12px!important;
    overflow-x:hidden!important;
  }
  .side{
    position:fixed!important;
    z-index:3000!important;
    top:10px!important;
    left:10px!important;
    bottom:96px!important;
    width:min(86vw,360px)!important;
    max-width:calc(100vw - 20px)!important;
    min-height:auto!important;
    overflow:auto!important;
    transform:translateX(calc(-100% - 28px));
    transition:transform .24s ease, box-shadow .24s ease;
    border-radius:28px!important;
    box-shadow:0 24px 70px rgba(84,43,68,.24)!important;
    overscroll-behavior:contain;
  }
  body.mobile-drawer-open-v1026 .side{transform:translateX(0);}
  .mobile-drawer-scrim-v1026{
    display:block;
    position:fixed;
    inset:0;
    z-index:2500;
    background:rgba(65,43,56,.36);
    backdrop-filter:blur(4px);
    opacity:0;
    pointer-events:none;
    transition:opacity .22s ease;
  }
  body.mobile-drawer-open-v1026 .mobile-drawer-scrim-v1026{opacity:1;pointer-events:auto;}
  .mobile-nav-v1026{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:repeat(5,minmax(0,1fr));
    gap:5px;
    position:fixed;
    left:10px;
    right:10px;
    bottom:max(10px,env(safe-area-inset-bottom));
    z-index:2400;
    padding:8px;
    border-radius:27px;
    background:rgba(255,255,255,.92);
    border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.18);
    box-shadow:0 18px 45px rgba(128,72,100,.22);
    backdrop-filter:blur(18px);
  }
  .mobile-nav-btn-v1026{
    appearance:none;
    border:0;
    cursor:pointer;
    min-width:0;
    min-height:58px;
    border-radius:20px;
    background:transparent;
    color:#87616f;
    display:grid;
    place-items:center;
    gap:2px;
    font:inherit;
    font-weight:950;
    padding:5px 2px;
  }
  .mobile-nav-btn-v1026 span{font-size:22px;line-height:1;}
  .mobile-nav-btn-v1026 small{font-size:11px;line-height:1.15;white-space:nowrap;}
  .mobile-nav-btn-v1026.active,
  .mobile-nav-btn-v1026:active{
    color:#8c4a61;
    background:linear-gradient(135deg,#fff1f7,#f1e8ff);
    box-shadow:0 8px 18px rgba(128,72,100,.10);
  }
  .main{min-width:0!important;width:100%!important;}
  .content{padding:14px!important;overflow-x:hidden!important;}
  .right{display:none!important;}
  .top{padding:14px 15px!important;align-items:flex-start;}
  .top .status{display:none;}
  .top h2{font-size:21px;line-height:1.35;}
  .top p{font-size:12px;}
  .brand{padding:14px!important;}
  .profile{margin-top:0!important;}
}
@media(min-width:861px){
  .mobile-nav-v1026,
  .mobile-drawer-scrim-v1026{display:none!important;}
}


/* ===== v0.10.27 Mobile Drawer Layer Fix ===== */
@media(max-width:860px){
  /* 讓固定側欄脫離 .app 的 stacking context，避免被灰色遮罩蓋住後整個變模糊 */
  .app{z-index:auto!important;}
  .mobile-drawer-scrim-v1026{
    z-index:4200!important;
    background:rgba(65,43,56,.30)!important;
    backdrop-filter:blur(3px)!important;
    -webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(3px)!important;
  }
  body.mobile-drawer-open-v1026 .side{
    z-index:5000!important;
    transform:translateX(0)!important;
    filter:none!important;
  }
  .mobile-nav-v1026{z-index:4100!important;}
  body.mobile-drawer-open-v1026 .mobile-nav-v1026{pointer-events:none;}
}



/* ===== v0.10.28 Soul Gallery × Paper Doll Framework ===== */
.gallery-v1028,.dollhouse-v1028{display:grid;gap:14px;}
.gallery-hero-v1028,.doll-hero-v1028{position:relative;overflow:hidden;padding:20px;border-radius:28px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(255,255,255,.84),rgba(255,230,239,.70),rgba(243,236,255,.68));border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.16);box-shadow:var(--soft);}
.gallery-hero-v1028:after,.doll-hero-v1028:after{content:"✦";position:absolute;right:22px;top:8px;font-size:86px;color:rgba(151,91,113,.08);font-weight:950;pointer-events:none;}
.gallery-hero-v1028 h3,.doll-hero-v1028 h3{margin:0 0 8px;color:#44323a;font-size:24px;}
.gallery-hero-v1028 p,.doll-hero-v1028 p{margin:0;color:#765160;line-height:1.75;font-size:13px;position:relative;z-index:1;}
.gallery-layout-v1028{display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(0,.85fr) minmax(0,1.15fr);gap:14px;align-items:start;}
.gallery-uploader-v1028,.gallery-wall-v1028,.doll-card-v1028{padding:15px;border-radius:24px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.76);border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.14);box-shadow:0 8px 18px rgba(128,72,100,.07);}
.gallery-uploader-v1028 h3,.gallery-wall-v1028 h3,.doll-card-v1028 h3{margin:0 0 10px;color:#44323a;}
.gallery-form-v1028{display:grid;gap:10px;}
.gallery-form-v1028 textarea{min-height:92px;}
.gallery-actions-v1028,.doll-actions-v1028{display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:10px;align-items:center;}
.gallery-filter-v1028{display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin:0 0 12px;}
.gallery-filter-v1028 button,.doll-mini-btn-v1028{appearance:none;border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.14);background:#fff7fa;color:#8f4f64;border-radius:999px;padding:8px 10px;font:inherit;font-size:12px;font-weight:950;cursor:pointer;}
.gallery-filter-v1028 button.active{color:#fff;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#ce7891,#9c6bd7);}
.gallery-grid-v1028{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(170px,1fr));gap:10px;}
.gallery-item-v1028{border-radius:20px;overflow:hidden;background:#fff8fb;border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.13);box-shadow:0 8px 18px rgba(128,72,100,.06);display:grid;}
.gallery-thumb-v1028{height:130px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#fff0f6,#eee6ff);display:grid;place-items:center;color:#b06b82;font-size:36px;background-size:cover;background-position:center;}
.gallery-info-v1028{padding:11px;display:grid;gap:5px;}
.gallery-info-v1028 strong{color:#4f3640;font-size:14px;line-height:1.35;}
.gallery-info-v1028 small{color:#9b7b86;font-weight:850;}
.gallery-info-v1028 p{margin:0;color:#765160;line-height:1.55;font-size:12px;white-space:pre-wrap;}
.gallery-empty-v1028,.doll-empty-v1028{padding:16px;border-radius:18px;background:#fff8fb;border:1px dashed rgba(151,91,113,.22);color:#8b717b;line-height:1.7;text-align:center;}
.gallery-status-v1028,.doll-status-v1028{min-height:20px;color:#9d5870;font-size:12px;font-weight:850;line-height:1.6;margin-top:8px;}
.doll-layout-v1028{display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1.05fr) minmax(280px,.95fr);gap:14px;align-items:start;}
.doll-stage-v1028{min-height:420px;border-radius:30px;padding:18px;display:grid;align-content:end;background:radial-gradient(circle at 20% 10%,rgba(255,255,255,.9),transparent 30%),linear-gradient(135deg,#fff3f8,#f2ebff 58%,#e9f7ff);border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.14);box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.45),var(--soft);position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
.doll-scene-label-v1028{position:absolute;left:16px;top:16px;padding:8px 11px;border-radius:999px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.78);border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.12);color:#8c4a61;font-size:12px;font-weight:950;}
.doll-couple-v1028{display:flex;justify-content:center;align-items:flex-end;gap:24px;min-height:310px;}
.doll-person-v1028{width:118px;display:grid;justify-items:center;gap:6px;position:relative;transition:.22s ease;}
.doll-person-v1028.hug{transform:translateX(8px) rotate(-2deg);}
.doll-person-v1028.hug + .doll-person-v1028{transform:translateX(-8px) rotate(2deg);}
.doll-head-v1028{width:64px;height:64px;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f8f1ff,#d8dfff);border:2px solid rgba(255,255,255,.9);box-shadow:0 8px 18px rgba(128,72,100,.12);display:grid;place-items:center;font-size:26px;}
.doll-body-v1028{width:82px;height:112px;border-radius:34px 34px 28px 28px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#2f2b3d,#76506f);border:2px solid rgba(255,255,255,.65);box-shadow:0 10px 20px rgba(128,72,100,.12);position:relative;}
.doll-person-v1028.yin .doll-head-v1028{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#fff,#ffdce8);}
.doll-person-v1028.yin .doll-body-v1028{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#fff,#f7c6ce);}
.doll-person-v1028 .doll-name-v1028{padding:4px 8px;border-radius:999px;background:#fff8fb;border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.12);color:#6d4d59;font-size:12px;font-weight:950;}
.doll-controls-v1028{display:grid;gap:10px;}
.doll-control-grid-v1028{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr));gap:9px;}
.doll-control-grid-v1028 label{display:grid;gap:6px;}
.doll-save-list-v1028{display:grid;gap:9px;margin-top:10px;max-height:260px;overflow:auto;}
.doll-save-item-v1028{padding:11px;border-radius:17px;background:#fff8fb;border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.13);}
.doll-save-item-v1028 strong{display:block;color:#4f3640;margin-bottom:4px;}
.doll-save-item-v1028 span{display:block;color:#8b717b;font-size:12px;line-height:1.55;}
@media(max-width:980px){.gallery-layout-v1028,.doll-layout-v1028{grid-template-columns:1fr;}.doll-stage-v1028{min-height:370px}.doll-couple-v1028{min-height:260px}.doll-person-v1028{width:104px}.doll-head-v1028{width:58px;height:58px}.doll-body-v1028{width:74px;height:98px}}
@media(max-width:520px){.gallery-grid-v1028{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}.gallery-thumb-v1028{height:112px}.doll-couple-v1028{gap:10px}.doll-person-v1028{width:92px}.doll-control-grid-v1028{grid-template-columns:1fr}.gallery-actions-v1028 .btn,.gallery-actions-v1028 .send,.doll-actions-v1028 .btn,.doll-actions-v1028 .send{flex:1 1 100%;}.gallery-hero-v1028 h3,.doll-hero-v1028 h3{font-size:21px;}}



/* ===== v0.10.29 Paper Doll First Wardrobe Pack ===== */
.dollhouse-v1029{gap:16px;}
.doll-stage-v1029{min-height:560px;align-content:center;padding:58px 16px 20px;}
.doll-stage-caption-v1029{position:absolute;left:16px;right:16px;bottom:14px;padding:9px 12px;border-radius:18px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.78);border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.12);color:#765160;font-size:12px;font-weight:850;line-height:1.55;text-align:center;backdrop-filter:blur(8px);}
.doll-visual-frame-v1029{width:min(100%,620px);margin:0 auto 34px;border-radius:30px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(255,255,255,.70),rgba(255,242,248,.54));border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.13);box-shadow:0 16px 30px rgba(128,72,100,.10);display:grid;place-items:center;padding:12px;overflow:hidden;}
.doll-couple-img-v1029{display:block;width:min(100%,540px);max-height:610px;object-fit:contain;border-radius:22px;filter:drop-shadow(0 14px 18px rgba(128,72,100,.13));transition:transform .22s ease,opacity .18s ease;}
.doll-couple-img-v1029.pose-hug{transform:scale(1.025) translateY(-2px);}
.doll-couple-img-v1029.pose-vow{transform:scale(1.04) translateY(-5px);}
.doll-pack-note-v1029{padding:11px 12px;border-radius:18px;background:#fff8fb;border:1px dashed rgba(151,91,113,.23);color:#7d5965;line-height:1.7;font-size:12px;font-weight:800;}
.doll-wardrobe-v1029{display:grid;gap:10px;margin-top:4px;}
.doll-wardrobe-title-v1029{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:10px;margin:2px 0 0;}
.doll-wardrobe-title-v1029 h3{margin:0;color:#44323a;}
.doll-wardrobe-title-v1029 span{font-size:11px;color:#9d5870;font-weight:950;background:#fff2f7;border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.13);border-radius:999px;padding:6px 9px;white-space:nowrap;}
.doll-wardrobe-grid-v1029{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr));gap:10px;}
.doll-wardrobe-card-v1029{appearance:none;border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.14);background:rgba(255,255,255,.82);border-radius:22px;padding:9px;text-align:left;cursor:pointer;box-shadow:0 8px 18px rgba(128,72,100,.06);display:grid;gap:7px;color:inherit;transition:.18s ease;}
.doll-wardrobe-card-v1029:hover{transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 12px 22px rgba(128,72,100,.10);}
.doll-wardrobe-card-v1029.active{border-color:rgba(206,120,145,.55);background:linear-gradient(135deg,#fff,#fff0f6);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(215,127,153,.13),0 12px 22px rgba(128,72,100,.10);}
.doll-wardrobe-thumb-v1029{height:118px;border-radius:17px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#fff2f7,#f0eaff);background-size:cover;background-position:center top;border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.10);}
.doll-wardrobe-card-v1029 strong{font-size:13px;color:#4f3640;line-height:1.35;}
.doll-wardrobe-card-v1029 small{font-size:11px;color:#8b717b;line-height:1.45;font-weight:800;}
.doll-coming-v1029{display:grid;gap:8px;margin-top:2px;}
.doll-coming-row-v1029{padding:10px 11px;border-radius:16px;background:#fff8fb;border:1px solid rgba(151,91,113,.11);font-size:12px;line-height:1.55;color:#765160;}
.doll-coming-row-v1029 strong{color:#8c4a61;}
@media(max-width:980px){.doll-stage-v1029{min-height:520px}.doll-couple-img-v1029{max-height:520px}.doll-visual-frame-v1029{margin-bottom:38px;}}
@media(max-width:520px){.doll-stage-v1029{min-height:450px;padding:56px 8px 18px}.doll-visual-frame-v1029{border-radius:24px;padding:7px;margin-bottom:52px}.doll-couple-img-v1029{max-height:360px;border-radius:18px}.doll-stage-caption-v1029{bottom:10px;font-size:11px}.doll-wardrobe-grid-v1029{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px}.doll-wardrobe-thumb-v1029{height:90px}.doll-wardrobe-card-v1029{border-radius:18px;padding:7px}.doll-wardrobe-card-v1029 strong{font-size:12px}.doll-wardrobe-card-v1029 small{font-size:10px}.doll-wardrobe-title-v1029{align-items:flex-start;flex-direction:column;gap:5px}}
